channel.title: Qwen3.5-0.8B on TinyWeights.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Qwen3.5-0.8B on TinyWeights.dev

item.title: The Developer's Guide to Qwen 3.5 0.8B: A Hands-On Tutorial for Local Deployment
item.description: Learn how to locally deploy Qwen 3.5 0.8B, an efficient open-source Small Language Model (SLM) for edge AI, multimodal tasks, and on-device inference.
